message:
test(newproj): add coverage for custom section registration validation

Add four new bats tests for the register_custom_section() function
in newproj_agents.sh to cover the input validation guards added in
the previous security hardening commit:

1. "registers callable custom content function" - Verifies the happy
   path: registering a custom section and then retrieving its content
   via get_section_content() correctly invokes the provided function
   with the project_name argument.

2. "rejects invalid section ids" - Verifies that section IDs containing
   hyphens (or other non-alphanumeric/underscore characters) are
   rejected with a clear error message, preventing eval injection.

3. "rejects unknown content functions" - Verifies that referencing a
   function name that has not been defined triggers a failure at
   registration time, catching typos early.

4. "rejects duplicate section ids" - Verifies that attempting to
   re-register a built-in section ID (e.g. "header") fails with an
   error, preventing accidental overwrites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
